basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website www.aiims.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in relevant subject/field with three years post qualification Experience or PhD in relevant subject/field
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree in relevant subject/field with three years post qualification Experience or PhD in relevant subject/field.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) position is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree in a relevant subject/field with at least three years of post-qualification experience, or a PhD in the relevant subject/field.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) position?
faq.answer: The salary for this post will be as per the norms set by the Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR).

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Research Scientist-II (Non-medical) at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for this position by sending their application via Email.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
